rulings.Case Title: CARL BRADSHAW VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, AUGUST 7, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Defendant RPI Company's motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)
